title: The World Reacts Before the Reverie
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14 as News of Whole Cake Island spreads across the world and the story pivots toward the Reverie.
scene: The world learns a distorted version of the Whole Cake Island incident as royal delegations move toward the Reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ka- Mabaka kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: For the sake of the Fishmen peoples,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You fight the world government, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Isn't it a bit complicated, then, Koala?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ryugu Kingdom's participation in the reverie, I mean.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Not at all, Betty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Our true foe isn't the world government.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the celestial Dragon class that controls it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Red line

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: GYAAAH! D... did you just see that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You really are noisy, King of Goa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So high! So scary!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The wind's so strong! We're rock- ing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A giant just peeked out of the cliff! He was holding a Harpoon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What sort of hallucinations are you seeing... just how high up do you think we are?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm serious! He was there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: gyaaah! Look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Crows!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: If Crows Pierce the Bubble, We'll Fall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: rare to see them at this height.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WAAH! I have heard tell of these!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They're Birds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They fly through the air!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Oi! Guards! Guns up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shoot them down! They're going to pop the bubbles!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's okay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Crows have never before broken the bubbles of the lifts.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Do not worry,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: King Stelly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Infil- Tration!

summary: This section advances the Reverie Setup storyline with 30 dialogue beats. The aftermath becomes world news and the narrative shifts toward the Reverie and global politics.
